name: Pawapay
description: Pawapay — Mobile money aggregator for Africa covering 35 telecom operators across 18 countries with a single collection API.

seo.title: Pawapay — Payment Gateway / PSP
seo.meta_description: Pawapay: Pawapay — Mobile money aggregator for Africa covering 35 telecom operators across 18 countries with a single collection API.

when_to_use: Aggregating mobile money collections across 35 African operators
Single API for disbursements across 18 African countries
Reconciling mobile money receipts from multiple telcos

cons: Mobile money only, no card rails
review.verdict: Top pick for pan-African mobile money, sparing you the pain of integrating each telco separately.
review.best_for: International businesses needing pan-African mobile money collections and payouts
review.not_for: Merchants needing card acceptance or markets outside Africa
